title: Stonebat
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''Stonebats''' were flying animals native to [[Yavin 4/Legends|Yavin 4]]. They made nests in the ventilation shafts of [[Temple Atun]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Before the Storm]]''
